creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=8aa9ddab62073f48d22600d9b20cfce858af661a

commit 8aa9ddab62073f48d22600d9b20cfce858af661a
Author:     Ben Shertenlieb <b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com>
AuthorDate: 2022-06-25 04:51:01 +0000
Commit:     Neel Chauhan <nc@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-06-25 04:51:01 +0000

    multimedia/plexmediaserver: Update to 1.27.1.5916

    Changelog:

     * (Database) Fix an issue where re-migrating a database could fail after
       downgrading, interrupting the server startup process, then immediately
       re-upgrading (#13643)

     * (Library) When media was deleted it could leave behind its sidecar files
       (#13479)

     * (Music) Album year and date fields could differ when preferring local
    metadata (#13591)

     * (Transcoder) Audio could drop out partway through playback when remuxing
       videos with very long keyframe intervals to DASH (#13411)

    Full Changelog: https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/514

    PR:     264881

 multimedia/plexmediaserver/Makefile | 4 ++--
 multimedia/plexmediaserver/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
